creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
I'd like to kindly ask upgrading port devel/py-contextlib2 from 0.6.0.post1 to more recent version 21.6.0.
Personally I run into a problem when using the Espressif ESP-IDF which requires a port version > 0.6.0.

Thank you in advance.

p.s. I simply changed the DISTVERSION and didn't see any problems so far with other ports requiring the aformentioned port when building via poudriere on CURRENT.
